artifact_contract: Record current public-source findings that change route proof confidence without regenerating the active field packet.

sources.source: Bogus Basin Deer Point Stewardship Project 2026
sources.route_impact: Bogus routes remain condition/date gated through 2026-06-19 weekday closure window

sources.source: Ridge to Rivers special management strategies
sources.route_impact: Lower Hulls, Polecat, Around the Mountain, Bucktail-related routes require current signage/date/use checks
May 2026 mud/snow/ice signals gate immediate field tests but do not mutate June/July route design by themselves

route_impacts.why_changed: Avimor owner-language says trails are open for Avimor residents, while the route proof relied on OSM plus AllTrails parking evidence. That public source does not prove public challenge-participant access.
route_impacts.what_did_not_change: No known accepted same-credit or optimizer replacement currently dominates the H1 route shape.
route_impacts.required_action: Get BTC organizer, Avimor, or current field-signage confirmation for public participant use from the Spring Valley Creek start, or redesign H1 from a certifiable public anchor.

route_impacts.why_changed: No new route-shape mutation; public closure notice confirms June 18 and Friday, June 19, 2026 remain risky/blocking weekdays for road/trail access around Deer Point/Pat's/Bogus Basin Road windows.
route_impacts.what_did_not_change: Keep Bogus routes as current best known route shapes when access is open.
route_impacts.required_action: Schedule after the June 19 closure window when possible and do day-of Bogus/Ridge to Rivers condition checks before field use.

route_impacts.why_changed: Ridge to Rivers management rules reinforce current direction/separation gates for Lower Hulls, Polecat, Around the Mountain, and Bucktail-related pedestrian access.
route_impacts.what_did_not_change: No public source found a better replacement route by itself.
route_impacts.required_action: Verify current signs and date/use rules before field execution.
